summary: Iteration 14 testing completed. All backend tests pass (11/11 = 100%), all frontend features verified. GitHub-based update system shows 'configured=false' correctly when GITHUB_REPO not set. Lockscreen QR toggle works (shows/hides QR on kiosk). Public leaderboard accessible without auth. Admin sidebar scrollable on small viewport.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/updates/check returns configured=false when GITHUB_REPO not set
Backend: GET /api/updates/status returns current_version='1.0.0' and github_repo=''
Backend: GET /api/updates/check requires auth (401 without)
Backend: GET /api/updates/status requires auth (401 without)
Backend: GET /api/settings/lockscreen-qr returns default config (enabled, label, path)
Backend: PUT /api/settings/lockscreen-qr with enabled=true saves and persists
Backend: PUT /api/settings/lockscreen-qr requires auth (401 without)
Backend: GET /api/system/base-url returns valid URL (https://boardgame-repair.preview.emergentagent.com)
Backend: GET /api/system/base-url does NOT return localhost or 127.0.0.1
Backend: GET /api/stats/leaderboard works without auth
Backend: Admin login works with admin/admin12345
Backend: Autodarts selector tests all pass (13/13)
Frontend: Public leaderboard at /public/leaderboard loads without auth
Frontend: Public leaderboard shows cafe branding (DART ZONE) and period filters (Heute, Woche, Monat, Alle)
Frontend: Kiosk lock screen at /kiosk/BOARD-1 shows QR code in footer when lockscreen-qr enabled
Frontend: Kiosk lock screen hides QR code when lockscreen-qr disabled (shows 'Staff Panel: /admin' fallback)
Frontend: Admin Settings > Kiosk-Texte tab has QR toggle (data-testid='lockscreen-qr-toggle'), label input, path input
Frontend: Admin System > Updates tab shows 'Auf Updates prüfen' button and current version v1.0.0
Frontend: Admin sidebar on 768x600 viewport shows all 11 nav items scrollable
Frontend: User/logout section at bottom doesn't overlap with nav items
Frontend: No Emergent branding visible in kiosk, admin, or public pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 features tested: 1) GitHub-based update system at /api/updates/check and /api/updates/status - shows 'configured=false' since GITHUB_REPO not set in .env. 2) Lockscreen QR config at /api/settings/lockscreen-qr with toggle in Admin Settings > Kiosk-Texte tab. 3) Public leaderboard at /public/leaderboard accessible without auth. 4) System base-url at /api/system/base-url returns external URL (not localhost). 5) Admin sidebar scrollable with all 11 nav items. 6) Autodarts DOM selector tests (13) all pass. No Emergent branding anywhere.
